query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(solicitacao) as primeira, MAX(solicitacao) as ultima FROM febraban WHERE MONTH(STR_TO_DATE(solicitacao, '%d/%m/%Y')) = 5 AND YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(solicitacao, '%d/%m/%Y')) = 2026 LIMIT 1;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user axRHbWZqKReZrAb.b2cf85c9ad94 --database SMgJn6AGQCNfDq7mPzPqc9 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, MIN(solicitacao) as primeira, MAX(solicitacao) as ultima FROM febraban WHERE MONTH(STR_TO_DATE(solicitacao, '%d/%m/%Y')) = 5 AND YEAR(STR_TO_DATE(solicitacao, '%d/%m/%Y')) = 2026 LIMIT 1;
